name: digitorn
description: Go build scripts — npm run <script> wrappers for the digitorn project

scripts.build: npm run build:daemon && npm run build:cli && npm run build:workers
scripts.build:workers: go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/digitorn-worker.exe ./cmd/digitorn-worker && go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/digitorn-worker-llm.exe ./cmd/digitorn-worker-llm && go build -trimpath -ldflags "-s -w" -o bin/digitorn-worker-embeddings.exe ./cmd/digitorn-worker-embeddings
scripts.run-daemon: npm run build:daemon && npm run build:workers && ./bin/digitornd.exe
scripts.test:coverage: go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.txt -covermode=atomic ./... && go tool cover -html=coverage.txt -o coverage.html
